zh.title: 狗狗币/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前DOGE/USD处于窄幅震荡格局，价格0.07698略低于20日均线0.07716，整体呈弱势整理，短线多空拉锯明显。短期偏空震荡运行。

MACD仍保持微弱正值0.00035，但信号线缺失显示动能不完整，RSI暂不可用，市场波动率处于低位收敛阶段。多空动能偏弱。整理延续。

下方支撑位关注0.0769及0.0765区域，上方阻力集中于0.0772与0.0775附近，均线压制仍然有效。短期突破需放量确认。

操作建议以区间交易为主，未有效突破前避免追涨杀跌，等待放量突破确认方向后再顺势跟进。建议严格设置止损控制风险。短线观望为宜。

en.title: Dogecoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Dogecoin vs USD is trading in an extremely tight consolidation around 0.07698, reflecting very low volatility and short-term indecision. Price action continues to hover near session lows after repeated failures to establish momentum above 0.07708. The structure is neutral to mildly bearish in the very short term, as upward attempts lose strength quickly while buyers only manage to defend marginal lows without generating meaningful follow-through.

From an indicator perspective, price is positioned slightly below the 20-period SMA at 0.077161, reinforcing a subtle bearish bias relative to the short-term trend baseline. The MACD reading at 0.00035887124 remains marginally positive, but without a confirmed signal line it lacks strong directional confirmation. With RSI unavailable, momentum assessment relies heavily on price compression, which typically precedes a volatility expansion phase in either direction.

Support is currently established in the 0.07697–0.07690 range, which aligns with the latest intraday lows and acts as a near-term defense zone for buyers. If this level fails, the next support area is expected around 0.07670, where prior micro-structure suggests additional demand may emerge. On the upside, resistance sits at 0.07708, followed closely by 0.07716 (SMA20), with a breakout level near 0.07730 needed to restore bullish momentum.

In terms of strategy, range-trading conditions dominate, favoring short-term scalping between defined support and resistance boundaries. Traders may look for long entries near support with tight stops below 0.07690, while taking profits into the 0.07708–0.07716 resistance zone. A breakout above 0.07716 would signal potential trend recovery, while a breakdown below support would shift bias toward continued downside pressure.
